_meta.description: Soft-tier mismatch baseline. Never allow soft counts to exceed these numbers; doing so means a fidelity regression. To update the baseline after an intentional change, run: python scripts/update_parity_ratchet.py --fixture <id>
_meta.schema: fixture_id -> {hard: int, soft: int, info: int}
_meta.phase: 0 baseline (wolfxl 0.3.2). Each fixture below registered 0 hard/soft/info mismatches under the current harness; later phases that add SOFT-tier diffs (font/fill/border/alignment) must populate this file.
